クラス CapabilityProfile

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfile
public final class CapabilityProfile extends Object
Shared capability-profile layout used by profiling, observation encoding, and privileged-state encoding.

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    static final int
    BURST_WINDOW_SCORE
    Index for burst-window value score.
    static final int
    ENERGY_GENERATION_SCORE
    Index for energy generation score (particles per second).
    static final int
    ENTRY_VALUE_SCORE
    Index for on-entry value score (burst/skill snapshot impact).
    static final int
    EXIT_COST_SCORE
    Index for exit (swap-out) cost score.
    static final int
    OFF_FIELD_DPS_RATIO
    Index for off-field DPS ratio score.
    static final int
    ON_FIELD_DPS_SCORE
    Index for on-field DPS score.
    static final int
    REENTRY_COST_SCORE
    Index for re-entry cost score.
    static final int
    SELF_ENHANCEMENT_SCORE
    Index for self enhancement (personal buff) score.
    static final int
    SIZE
    Total number of capability scores per character.
    static final int
    SUSTAIN_VALUE_3_ACTIONS
    Index for sustained value over the next 3 actions.
    static final int
    SUSTAIN_VALUE_6_ACTIONS
    Index for sustained value over the next 6 actions.
    static final int
    TEAM_BUFF_SCORE
    Index for team buff contribution score.

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    修飾子
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    private
    CapabilityProfile()
    Private constructor to prevent instantiation of this utility holder.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static double[]
    zeros()
    Returns a freshly allocated zero-filled capability vector of length SIZE.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • zeros

      public static double[] zeros()
      Returns a freshly allocated zero-filled capability vector of length SIZE.
      戻り値:
      new double array of length SIZE filled with zero
